name: Region Analysis (admin)
description: Admin region-analysis page (/admin/region-analysis). ci-bot is a superuser so the page renders (non-superusers are redirected to /build/workflows). The page loads annotation sets from GET /api/v1/annotations/ — a route that returned 500 before #272 (proj region-analysis live-500 fix) and now returns the populated set list. We assert the POPULATED SUCCESS state: the annotation-set picker and the three-tab interface (Run Analysis / Results / History) that render ONLY when at least one annotation set loaded and a set is selected (page.tsx: the tab strip is gated behind `selectedSetId`, which is set from the first row of a non-empty fetch). This is deliberately NOT the loading flash ('Loading annotation sets...') nor the empty fallback ('No annotation sets found. Run an extraction first.') — so a future regression that re-500s the annotations API or renders the empty state FAILS this spec. The h1 'Region Analysis' header anchors the page chrome. Read-only; structural only.

states.name: Page header
states.description: Top-of-page chrome: the Admin breadcrumb button and the h1 'Region Analysis' heading. Renders for a superuser regardless of data (confirms no access-denied redirect).

assertions.description: h1 'Region Analysis' heading anchors the page.

states.name: Populated annotation-set tab interface
states.description: The three-tab strip (Run Analysis / Results / History) that renders ONLY when a non-empty annotation-set fetch resolved and a set is selected (page.tsx gates `{selectedSetId && (...tabs...)}`). Asserting these tab buttons distinguishes the populated-success render from the loading flash and the empty fallback — the exact regression the #272 annotations-500 fix unblocked.
